artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report documenting extension directory structure, manifest.json schema, index-entries.json format, and recommended grant extension structure
Supplemental research on grant application best practices, SFF structure analysis, and context file recommendations

active_projects.completion_summary: Created grant extension scaffold with 6 configuration files following nvim/lean extension patterns. Directory structure includes agents/, commands/, skills/, and context/project/grant/ with subdirectories for domain, patterns, templates, tools, and standards.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Created .claude/extensions/grant/ directory with manifest.json, EXTENSION.md, index-entries.json, opencode-agents.json, context README, and skill placeholder

artifacts.summary: Research report covering agent frontmatter standards, execution stages, context loading patterns, workflow routing, and integration with skill-grant
6-phase implementation plan for grant-agent with 4 workflow types

active_projects.completion_summary: Created grant-agent.md with comprehensive agent specification supporting funder research, proposal drafting, budget development, and progress tracking workflows. Agent follows established subagent pattern with 8-stage execution flow, progressive context loading, and early metadata pattern for interruption recovery.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Created .claude/extensions/grant/agents/grant-agent.md with full agent definition including frontmatter, tools, context discovery, execution stages, error handling, and critical requirements.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report documenting skill wrapper patterns, 11-stage execution flow, delegation context structure, and implementation recommendations
Implementation plan for skill-grant thin wrapper with workflow type routing and skill-internal postflight pattern
Implementation summary for skill-grant wrapper with verification results

active_projects.completion_summary: Created skill-grant thin wrapper implementing 11-stage execution flow with workflow type routing for four grant workflows (funder_research, proposal_draft, budget_develop, progress_track). Follows skill-researcher pattern with internal postflight for status updates, artifact linking, and git commits.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Created .claude/extensions/grant/skills/skill-grant/SKILL.md with complete skill implementation. This is part of the grant extension and does not require CLAUDE.md updates (extension skills are documented via manifest.json).

artifacts.summary: Research report with command structure patterns, argument parsing approaches, skill invocation patterns, postflight verification, and implementation recommendations

active_projects.completion_summary: Created /grant command for the grant extension following existing command patterns. Command supports four workflow types (funder_research, proposal_draft, budget_develop, progress_track) and delegates to skill-grant for execution.
active_projects.claudemd_suggestions: Added .claude/extensions/grant/commands/grant.md command, updated .claude/extensions/grant/manifest.json to register command
